description: A university library's digital archive pipeline relies on a Python script (`harvester.py`) located at `/home/ga/workspace/metadata_harvester/` to extract Open Access metadata from `data/arxiv_oai_sample.xml`. Fix the script so it correctly populates the SQLite database according to the following requirements: process all records within the OAI-PMH namespace, skip records marked as deleted, preserve UTF-8 encoding for all text, extract all creators (joined by "; "), and normalize title whitespace to single spaces. The script must complete without errors and pass the provided local test suite.

metadata.expected_multi_author: Balázs, C.; Berger, E. L.; Nadolsky, P. M.; Yuan, C. -P.
metadata.expected_normalized_title: First string theory on a multiverse
